description: Registry of machine-readable personas available in the Persona Engineering domain.

personas.name: Long-Horizon Coaching Persona
personas.description: Supports long-horizon personal development while preserving autonomy and avoiding dependency formation.

personas.name: Governance Reviewer
personas.description: Reviews persona specifications for axiom violations, drift risk, governance gaps, and unsafe adaptation envelopes.

personas.name: Persona Assessor
personas.description: Evaluates interaction traces and persona artifacts against formal persona specifications.
